properties: instrument — underpins all lens readouts; not itself a P1-P10 test
what: Per-layer Jacobian-lens matrices J_l = E[dh_final/dh_l], estimated by stochastic VJP probing with an identity control variate over wikitext-103 (512-token chunks, targets t' >= 64, batch 4).

validation.methodology_vs_paper: definition, averaging structure, and readout formula match transformer-circuits.pub/2026/workspace; paper is silent on estimator; our sampling choices fall inside its stated robustness set (future targets included, attention not frozen). Deviations to report: stochastic VJP estimator + identity control variate; wikitext-103 as prompt corpus.
